title: Validation Lane Review
goal: Check whether the documented validation lane still proves the promised contract for the current repo state.
non_goals: Do not open new feature work from this review alone.
Do not treat a now-fixed transient failure as an ongoing regression.

review_mode.review question: Does the normal aggregate validation lane still catch the important contract failures and run to completion?
review_mode.inputs inspected first: `Makefile`, `docs/maintainer-commands.md`, `make check`, strict memory freshness, payload verification

recommendation.dismiss: validation-lane weakness concerns in the current repo state

drift_log: 2026-04-09: Review created as part of the full review-matrix pass after confirming the absolute-path checker caught and rejected a stored review placeholder until it was corrected.
